issues.title: How to dynamically add McpSyncServer in a project and add sseendpoint as needed, such as /sse1, /sse2, /sse3....
issues.body: It is not implemented by annotating @bean at startup, but is created by code after startup

comments.body: You want add server dynamically on MCP client at runtime?
@czhcc Closing this as a duplicate of #3299. Shall we continue the discussion from there? Closing this for now. Thanks!
I want to add different tool methods to different sseendpoints. Now different sseendpoints can be generated through bean annotations. But I want to implement it through code.

labels.name: duplicate
labels.description: This issue or pull request already exists

issues.title: Support for OpenAI /v1/responses
issues.body:
Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, the feature you are about to request might have already been requested.

Currencty SpringAI does not support OpenAI Response API out of the box. This missing feature prevents me from using some more advanced OpenAI models such as o3-pro which does not have chat completion endpoint

https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/responses/create

comments.body: @Amine-Kadi Thanks for the pointer. Closing this as duplicate.
